findings.description: ccw/src/commands/learn.ts contains critical state mutation logic with no tests in tests/.
findings.title: No automated tests for learn state CLI (lock + atomic writes + schema validation)
findings.suggested_issue: Add unit/integration tests for concurrent access, stale locks, schema failures, and recovery.

findings.description: Helpers in .claude/commands/learn/_internal parse noisy CLI output but have no tests for edge cases.
findings.title: No tests for command-doc runtime helpers (safeExecJson / json parser)
findings.suggested_issue: Add tests for noisy/multi-line outputs, fenced JSON, empty output, and error mapping.

findings.description: Multiple docs embed JSON in quoted shell args. Without tests, quote/newline regressions will be caught late.
findings.title: No regression tests for JSON shell-escaping used in learn docs
findings.suggested_issue: Add tests with payloads containing apostrophes/newlines/unicode and ensure round-trip correctness.

findings.description: Security depends on Node version; there are no tests ensuring older Node paths are safe or blocked.
findings.title: mcp-runner lacks tests for Node version branches and sandbox guarantees
findings.suggested_issue: Add tests that assert fail-closed on unsupported Node versions and verify network/fs blocks.
